  • Uses of Party in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map

    Methods in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map with parameters of type Party
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    State.getPartyControl(Party party, Engine engine)
    Returns a double value representing the level of control of a party, based on control of the state legislature, governor, and previous electoral results.
    Map<Integer,Integer>
    State.getTotalResultsForPartyByYear(Party party)
    Get the sum of all votes for a party sorted by year.
